hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path" <<< "$(cat)"); PROTECTED="eslint.config .prettierrc rustfmt.toml lefthook.yml"; for p in $PROTECTED; do case "$FILE" in *$p*) echo "BLOCKED: $FILE is a protected config file. Fix the code, not the linter/formatter config." >&2; exit 2;; esac; done'
